title: Delhi HC fines NGO for repeated adjournments in ₹10k crore defamation suit against BBC over PM Modi documentary
description: The Delhi High Court on Wednesday imposed a fine of ₹25,000 on a Gujarat-based non-profit called Justice on Trial for seeking repeated adjournments in its ₹10,000 crore defamation case against the British Broadcasting Corporation (BBC) for a documentary on Prime Minister Narendra Modi.Justice Mini Pushkarna passed the order after counsel appearing for the NGO sought an adjournment in the case. The lawyer said that the NGO was engaging a counsel to address arguments on the maintainability of the
